name: deploy_fly
description: Deploys the current project to Fly.io. Assumes Fly CLI (flyctl) is installed and configured (logged in). This tool will typically run 'flyctl deploy'.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project to deploy.

fly_auth_token.description: Optional Fly.io authentication token (FLY_API_TOKEN). If not provided, assumes CLI is already authenticated.

app_name.description: Optional Fly.io application name. If not provided, typically inferred from fly.toml or requires interactive creation.

config_file.description: Path to the Fly configuration file, relative to project_path. Defaults to 'fly.toml'.

hints.description: This tool is destructive as it creates or updates a deployment on Fly.io. Not idempotent.
